arts.ttl: LIVE: Arsenal take on Crystal Palace in Carabao Cup quarterfinals
Why VAR is not being used in Arsenal vs Crystal Palace and Tottenham vs Man United in Carabao Cup
arts.sum: Despite VAR being a regular part of Premier League football in recent years, it's still not the case in the Carabao Cup. The technology will not be used in Arsenal's quarter-final tie against Palace, Tottenham's clash against Man United or the other two fixtures this week. Should Arsenal and Tottenham both book their place in the Carabao Cup semi-final this week, then the two-legged tie will each have VAR in use.

arts.ttl: Arsenal make giant transfer U-turn after two results as major January obstacle cleared
arts.sum: Arsenal are 'opening' to the idea of letting Jakub Kiwior leave the club on loan in January. And now, according to Corriere del Mezzogiorno, Arsenal are considering the possibility of letting Kiwior leave in the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Agent spotted at Crystal Palace after apparent meeting with ‘close associates’ of Eagles heirarchy
arts.sum: Montpellier winger Othmane Maamma’s agent has been spotted visiting Crystal Palace, after being seen alongside close associates of Steve Parish. That’s according to journalist Sacha Tavolieri, who reports that the agent visited Crystal Palace’s English offices today.
